summary: Command Center UI Reorganization - All tests passed. DRHP Chapters module removed. Two separate DRHP Output buttons (Main Board and SME Board) added with correct styling, badges, and navigation.
passed_tests: 1. DRHP Chapters module removed from Command Center - PASS
2. Main Board DRHP button visible with data-testid='drhp-output-mainboard' - PASS
3. SME Board DRHP button visible with data-testid='drhp-output-sme' - PASS
4. Main Board button has 'NSE / BSE' badge (blue styling) - PASS
5. SME Board button has 'SME Platform' badge (green styling) - PASS
6. Main Board button navigates to /project/{id}/drhp-output?board=mainboard - PASS
7. SME Board button navigates to /project/{id}/drhp-output?board=sme - PASS
8. DRHP Output page reads board type from URL - PASS
9. Main Board tab active when URL has board=mainboard - PASS
10. SME Board tab active when URL has board=sme - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: TipTap editor shows duplicate extension warning for 'link' and 'underline' - minor console warning, not affecting functionality (same as previous iteration)
test_credentials: Test user, session, and project created via mongosh - cleaned up after testing
seed_data_creation: Test project created for navigation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Command Center UI reorganization complete. DRHP Chapters module removed (~140 lines of code removed). Two DRHP Output buttons now exist: Main Board (blue, Landmark icon, NSE/BSE badge) and SME Board (green, Building2 icon, SME Platform badge). Each passes 'board' query param to DRHP Output page which sets the correct active tab.

drhp_chapters_removal.description: DRHP Chapters module and expandable section completely removed from Command Center

main_board_button.description: Main Board DRHP button with blue styling, Landmark icon, and NSE/BSE badge

sme_board_button.description: SME Board DRHP button with green styling, Building2 icon, and SME Platform badge

url_param_tab_selection.description: DRHP Output page reads board type from URL and sets correct active tab
